spaces.notes: Primary outdoor living zone; extends horizon axis; wind-protected design required

spaces.name: Landscape Zone

assumptions: total_sqm (356 sqm) reflects sum of all programmed spaces including terraces and pool deck. Client stated 'approximately 320 sqm' which likely refers to enclosed built area only (229 sqm enclosed + 127 sqm covered/outdoor = 356 total). Marcela should confirm with client which metric applies to the budget target.

Covered terrace (55 sqm) and pool deck (45 sqm) treated as billable built area for cost basis due to coastal wind-protection requirements — these will require full structural design, not light pergola construction.
Bathrooms sized at 8 sqm each — standard for standalone residential; master bath is integrated into master suite count.
Landscape zone (27 sqm) scoped for native scrub transition design; landscape coordination is in project scope per client brief.
Interior design coordination in scope per special_features — interior designer TBD at client's choice.
Pool included in program as pool deck area; pool structure and equipment to be specified in engineering phase.
Solar installation in scope per special_features — system sizing deferred to engineering phase (Emilio).
